reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in good companies. The highest salary package offered ranges between 2 CPA - 3 CPA. The salary packages depend on abilities. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 6 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 10 LPA - 20 LPA. Around 70-80% of students got internships. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Google, and Microsoft. Top roles offered are software developer, web developer, app developer, software testing, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, etc. Classrooms are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering (2nd Shift) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with its faculty members and placements in 2021.

review_content.Placements: Every year, 75% of students get placed in good companies in UP, Haryana, etc. Companies like Puzzlona, Gillette, Maruti, etc., came to hire students. I got a placement at Megamine Construction Pvt. Ltd. in 2021 as a JE. My internship was with Oro Construction Pvt. Ltd. Placements were good for diploma students.
review_content.Infrastructure: It had well-maintained classrooms. Every day, they conduct sports. It had a computer lab, a surveying lab, etc. Medical facilities were good. The canteen food was far better than others. It was like homemade food. The hostel had big rooms. Some rooms had attached washrooms. There are 2 big common bathrooms on every floor. On every floor, two sweepers are available for cleaning every day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Placement is average. According to the college's fee, infrastructure is okay.

review_content.Placements: Placement of this college is not good. Every student has to go for off-campus placements for better options. If your family financial background is strong then don't take admission here. Go for some other institution, otherwise according to the fees this college is okay.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures of this college is good, not beautiful but it is good. Only labs are there. Cafeteria is very bad. According to the fees they charge, this college is perfect. It all depends on your financial condition, if it is good then you can go for some other college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by the facilities, good placement records and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good. There are many top companies recruiting many candidates with good packages. Roles offered are software development, website developers, etc. Infosys and Wipro hired the students but due to pandemic, the process has slowed down and the companies are unable to come for placement. I hope it will improve.
review_content.Infrastructure: Courses are the best and hostel facilities are also great. Quality of food is best and it is available at a proper time. But sometimes it's not good for some students because daily, they serve the same food. Sometimes it's not properly cooked. Sports day is also organised every year in which students take part to achieve prizes. Some of them give their best to go higher in that particular sports. Many students from my college have gone to play sports at national level.

reviews_list.review_title: I love the opportunities provided here.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% to 70% of the students got placed from this course. The highest salary offered was 1 lac per month, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. MedPlus, Divis and Apollo are the top recruiters for our course. Above 73% of the students do internships. Many companies visit here for jobs, and our college gives more opportunities in many fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good here, and the library is available. Many of the classrooms are according to the courses, and the medical facilities are good. The food is above average in this hostel. Many sports are conducted in this college. The campus is very good, and the environment is very pleasant here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Extremely dissatisfied of faculty, with completely very less equipments in labs with less chemical.

Better to prefer separate as individual. May me 10percent of total students may get the job opportunities. Iam studying first year 2019-2024 batch. All the information collected from previous students who faced the problem.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has both B. pharmacy, and also M. pharmacy. Has a low range Wi-Fi, with a library with few books. Library has very less books. Or private hostels, no canteen, if inspection is going to be done then within time temporary volleyball courts are made and removed after the inspection.

overview_faqs.answer: Ryan College For Higher Education is a distinguished institution offering M.Sc, M.A, M.Com, B.A, B.Com, BCA, B.Sc, BBA. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies field. Ryan College For Higher Education is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Ryan College For Higher Education has received an impressive review rating of 2.8 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 2 for Campus Life, 1 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Ryan College For Higher Education Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Non-Medical - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to study in.

content.Placements: Placements were not provided in our college. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the lowest salary package was 1 LPA. Top recruiting company was ICICI Bank. Students who scored more than 60% got internships in our course at ICICI Bank. Top role offered was salesman.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. Wi-Fi was not available on campus. Classrooms were good and well-maintained. Library was good and a relaxing place for all the students. Hostel and college canteen served good food. Parking and sports grounds were big and well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good campus. dissatisfaction in placement. average experience.

content.Placements: Very bad situation in placements. No companies are there to offer a job for students. I personally read from here and I passed out with 77% in B.Com but yet unimployed. Those who coming for placement, think twice.
content.Infrastructure: There are very well ventilated and spacious classrooms. There is a proper library full of books. The college building has three floors. All Science labs and equipment are on the top floor and the computer lab is on 1st floor. There is one canteen in the college.
content.Faculty: The faculty is well educated and very friendly but some of them are greedy of tuition classes. They don't teach you in class but in tuition with extra fees. Although, there are also very good teachers like 'Mr. Jagdish Jindal' sir. The principal is a little bit strict.

faqs.answer: Among AAPC coding certifications, the Certified Professional Coder (CPC) is the most popular choice. Considered one of the most reputable certifications in the healthcare industry, the CPC demonstrates an individual's ability to accurately code medical procedures and diagnoses for insurance claims. One becomes CPC-certified by passing an exam that tests one's knowledge of medical terminology, anatomy, and coding regulations. CPC-certified professionals are among the highest-paid in this field, earning around $56,000 per year, 17% higher than the industry standard, suggests AAPC.
faqs.question: Q: Which AAPC certification is best?

faqs.answer: You have to meet the following basic eligibility requirements to sit for the CPC Exam under AAPC:Education: You need a high school Diploma or an equivalent qualification (GED).Experience: Two years of medical coding work experience is recommended, yet it is not necessary. If you do not have such experience, you are free to take the exam and receive the designation of CPC-A (Apprentice) until proven two years of coding experience that you have acquired. AAPC membership: Membership in AAPC is a prerequisite for registering for the exam. Training (Recommended): Not mandatory, but taking a medical coding course will surely give you a better edge for examination preparation and increase your chances of passing.
